lastReleaseMessage: Repository hygiene and release-signal cleanup. Stop the w...

barRaise.topFinding: The MEDIUM that opened the 06-23 review is closed: v0.5.2 (2026-06-24) ran the git rm --cached on the three gitignored-but-tracked files, finished the plain-ASCII brand, and reconciled scheduled_tasks, so the perpetual post-release dirty tree is gone. The new state is a clean cluster: drift-auto-fix has applied three correct fixes to the working tree (CLAUDE.md version pill v0.4.1 to v0.5.2, DESIGN.md section 17/section 20 prose drift from today's canonical audit, and a release.ps1 convergence step) but none are committed. The likely reason they have not shipped is the one new finding: today's canonical audit hit a corrupt .git/index ("index uses ... extension, which we do not understand") and could not run git status. The index self-healed by this run (git status works now), but the recovery is not in CLAUDE.md, which documents index.lock only. One deliberate index rebuild plus one commit clears the whole cluster and keeps the verdict healthy.
